$comment: Release self-declaration for the selfhelp-mobile-preview image, consumed by the unified registry's resolver (sh2-plugin-registry/scripts/resolve-core-candidate.mjs) at the git tag being released, and by this repo's web-preview-release.yml descriptor step. supports.core is the semver range of core (backend) versions this preview image works with: the preview renders CMS pages by calling the private backend through the same-origin /mobile-preview/api proxy, so it requires the mobile-preview session endpoints (POST /admin/mobile-preview/session + POST /mobile-preview/session/exchange) and the MobilePreviewAccessGuard read allowlist shipped in core 0.1.19. While the platform is pre-1.0 every 0.x minor is breaking, so the range tracks one core minor. requiredApiVersion mirrors the host pluginApiVersion. The mobile renderer contract this image advertises (mobileRendererVersion) is emitted into mobile-preview-release.json from web-preview/preview-plugins.json, NOT here. supports.core raised 0.1.32 -> 0.1.33 in mobile 0.1.33 (navigation overhaul): the renderer consumes the strict GET /cms-api/v1/navigation v2 payload (layer/description/aria_label always present, typed menu preset/max_depth/item_limit, no config object) that first ships in core 0.1.33; pairs with @selfhelp/shared 2.0.0.
